<?php namespace Vonage\Secrets; use DateTimeImmutable; use DateTimeInterface; use Vonage\Entity\Hydrator\ArrayHydrateInterface; class Secret implements ArrayHydrateInterface { protected DateTimeImmutable $createdAt; protected string $id; public function __construct(array $data = []) { if (!empty($data)) { $this->fromArray($data); } } public function getId(): string { return $this->id; } public function getCreatedAt(): DateTimeInterface { return $this->createdAt; } public function fromArray(array $data) { $this->id = $data['id']; $this->createdAt = new DateTimeImmutable($data['created_at']); } public function toArray(): array { return [ 'id' => $this->id, 'created_at' => $this->createdAt->format('Y-m-d\TH:i:s\Z'), ]; } }
